productDisplayName: Baggit Women Flora Astro Blue Belt
description: A belt is an essential detail to complete your ensemble and this slim belt from baggit is made of textured synthetic leather for optimal style and durability. With a generous, adjustable Fit, cinch this fashionable belt over a silk dress or wrap it around those stylish skinnies!Made of synthetic leather for durability and stylePrinted upperTang clasp to offer a snug fit and to hold the belt in placeMetal eyelets with a fixed loop to customise fitCareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
